name: @pavelsavara/jsco
description: browser polyfill for running WASM components

scripts.build:npm: npm run build && cp deploy/package.json dist/ && cp README.md dist/ && cp LICENSE dist/
scripts.build:npmw: set Configuration=Release&& set ContinuousIntegrationBuild=true&& npm run build && copy deploy\package.json dist && copy README.md dist && copy LICENSE dist
scripts.build:integration: cd integration-tests && cargo component build --release --target wasm32-wasip1 && cargo component build --release -p implementer --target wasm32-unknown-unknown
scripts.build:compositions: cd integration-tests && wac compose --dep jsco:forwarder=target/wasm32-wasip1/release/forwarder.wasm compositions/wrapped-forwarder.wac -o compositions/wrapped-forwarder.wasm && wac compose --dep jsco:forwarder=target/wasm32-wasip1/release/forwarder.wasm compositions/double-forwarder.wac -o compositions/double-forwarder.wasm && wac compose --dep jsco:forwarder=target/wasm32-wasip1/release/forwarder.wasm --dep jsco:wrapped-forwarder=compositions/wrapped-forwarder.wasm compositions/nested-double-forwarder.wac -o compositions/nested-double-forwarder.wasm && wac compose --dep jsco:forwarder=target/wasm32-wasip1/release/forwarder.wasm --dep jsco:implementer=target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/implementer.wasm compositions/forwarder-implementer.wac -o compositions/forwarder-implementer.wasm && wac compose --dep jsco:forwarder=target/wasm32-wasip1/release/forwarder.wasm --dep jsco:implementer=target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/implementer.wasm compositions/double-forwarder-implementer.wac -o compositions/double-forwarder-implementer.wasm && wac compose --dep jsco:forwarder=target/wasm32-wasip1/release/forwarder.wasm --dep jsco:forwarder-implementer=compositions/forwarder-implementer.wasm compositions/nested-forwarder-implementer.wac -o compositions/nested-forwarder-implementer.wasm
scripts.setup:rust: npm run setup:rust:rustup && npm run setup:rust:cargo
scripts.setup:rust:rustup: rustup toolchain install stable --profile default --no-self-update && rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown

author: Pavel Savara <pavel.savara@gmail.com>
